baseline-spike.name: Baseline Flash Sale Spike
baseline-spike.hypothesis: Under 50→250→50 users/s with no faults, pipeline completes and captures baseline latency/error metrics.

inventory-slowdown.name: Inventory Slowdown Cascade
inventory-slowdown.hypothesis: 3s inbound delay on inventory during peak causes cascading latency without circuit breaking.

payment-failure.name: Payment Hard Failure
payment-failure.hypothesis: 90% payment errors during checkout produce orphan orders or incorrect saga events.

pubsub-disruption.name: PubSub Disruption
pubsub-disruption.hypothesis: Order pub/sub deterioration during peak causes silent async fulfillment failures.

inventory-kill-oversell.name: Inventory Kill Oversell
inventory-kill-oversell.hypothesis: Inventory pod kill under concurrent reservations on low stock causes oversell or inconsistent stock.

retry-storm.name: Retry Storm
retry-storm.hypothesis: 2s inventory delay with intermittent 503s amplifies Order→Inventory traffic beyond user load (retry storm).

compound-fault.name: Compound Fault
compound-fault.hypothesis: Inventory delay + payment errors + order pub/sub faults under spike exceed individual failure impact.
